parameters-en.Wave: Controls the gain of the saw wave, blending it in with the constant square wave.
parameters-en.Interval 1: Sets the interval of the 1st harmony.
parameters-en.Interval 2: Sets the interval of the 2nd harmony.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the synth and the dry signal. At 0%, no synth is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
